parameters.name: unassignedReviewer
parameters.description: When true, returns only reports with no reviewer assigned. Overrides `reviewerUserId` if both are set.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Free-text search across company name, kennitala, report identifier, contact name, and contact email. Case-insensitive partial match.

get.description: Returns the persisted report result snapshot for a salary report, including report-level and role-level base/full compensation aggregates.
Adjusted base salary (baseSalary / workRatio) by gender and total score (all criteria). Returns scatter data points, a linear regression line, score-bucket averages with wage gap, and overall totals.

Adjusted base salary (baseSalary / workRatio) by gender and work score (mandatory criteria only, excludes PERSONAL). Returns scatter data points, a linear regression line, score-bucket averages with wage gap, and overall totals.

Adjusted full salary ((baseSalary + additionalSalary + bonusSalary) / workRatio) by gender and total score (all criteria). Returns scatter data points, a linear regression line, score-bucket averages with wage gap, and overall totals.
Gender wage gap for adjusted base salary (baseSalary / workRatio). Returns average and median salaries per gender with both average-based and median-based wage gap percentages.

Gender wage gap for adjusted full salary ((baseSalary + additionalSalary + bonusSalary) / workRatio). Returns average and median salaries per gender with both average-based and median-based wage gap percentages.
Average bonus salary (viðbótarlaun) and additional salary (aukagreiðslur) by gender. Raw values, not adjusted for work ratio. Returns per-gender breakdown with wage gap for each component and total.

info.title: Directorate of Equality API
info.description: The API for the Directorate of Equality

companyId.description: FK to the live company row

parentCompanyId.description: Parent company FK (nullable). Null on the top-level reporting company; set on each subsidiary.

employeeOrdinal.description: Ordinal of the employee in `parsed.employees[]` this deviation applies to.

equalityReportId.description: FK to the approved EQUALITY report this salary was audited against.

parsed.description: Parsed workbook payload from `POST /reports/excel/import`. Contains the criteria tree, role list, and employee rows.

reportId.description: Identifier of the newly created report row.
